g.text: Modules: home_assistant · memory · contacts · approvals | Flows: Scheduled Digests · Device Health · Environment Optimization
APPROVAL GATING DETAIL · SMART HOME ORCHESTRATION
Triggers when action is potentially disruptive:
4. On deny → action skipped, preference noted
Reads temp/humidity/air quality → compares vs. preferences
Flags anomalies, tracks savings vs. baseline
Stores issues in memory (volatile, high importance)
Alerts on degraded devices before user notices
